summary: Hyunwoo accepts an offer to become the disciple of the legendary knight Lebron, resulting in a unique class change and a significant boost to his stats and skills. After receiving a powerful artifact from the Emperor as a reward for his past efforts, he begins intensive magic-based training under Lebron's guidance. Meanwhile, a guild president plans to hire a professional player named 'Clear' to publicly humiliate Hyunwoo and ruin his reputation.
key_moments: Hyunwoo changes his class to 'Knight of Kione' and becomes Lebron's disciple.
The Emperor grants Hyunwoo the Ring of Nostalgia, a unique item that boosts experience and skill growth.
Hyunwoo begins specialized training with Lebron, demonstrating a natural aptitude for manipulating magic.
A rival guild leader initiates a plot to hire a high-ranking mercenary to defeat Hyunwoo during a live stream.
